ITEM 7. MANAGEMENT'S DISCUSSION AND ANALYSIS

Fiscal Year 2024 Highlights

Total revenue for fiscal 2024 was $245.1 billion, compared to $211.9 billion in fiscal 2023, an increase of 16%. This growth was driven by strong performance in Intelligent Cloud and continued strength in Productivity and Business Processes.

Total gross margin was $171.0 billion in fiscal 2024, representing a gross margin of 69.8%, compared to $146.1 billion or 68.9% in fiscal 2023. The improvement in gross margin was primarily driven by the higher mix of cloud services revenue and economies of

Apple Inc. 10-K Annual Report — Fiscal Year 2024
United States Securities and Exchange Commission
Washington, D.C. 20549

ITEM 1. BUSINESS

Apple Inc. (the "Company," "Apple") designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and accessories. Apple also sells a variety of related services. The Company's fiscal year is the 52 or 53-week period that ends on the last Saturday of September.

Apple is committed to bringing the best user experience to its customers through its innovative hardware, software, and services. Apple's products and services include iPh

s through its innovative hardware, software, and services. Apple's products and services include iPhone, Mac, iPad, Apple Watch, AirPods, Apple TV, HomePod, and a portfolio of consumer and professional software applications.

PRODUCTS

iPhone is Apple's line of smartphones based on its iOS operating system. iPhone designs incorporate motion sensors, cameras, displays, and cellular network capabilities. In fiscal 2024, iPhone net sales were $201.0 billion, representing approximately 52% of total net sales, compared to $205.5 billion in fiscal 2023.
